nasb.text: And He stretched out His hand and touched him, saying, “I am willing; be cleansed.” And immediately the leprosy left him.

esv.text: And Jesus stretched out his hand and touched him, saying, “I will; be clean.” And immediately the leprosy left him.

cnv.text: 耶穌伸手摸他，說：“我肯，你潔淨了吧！”痲風立刻離開了他。

ccb.text: 耶稣伸手摸他，说：“我肯，你洁净了吧！”他身上的麻风病立刻消失了。

csbs.text: 耶稣伸出手来摸他，说：“我愿意，你洁净了吧！”麻风病立刻离开了他。
